exercises.code:
opts=[{"n":"sync","score":3.8},{"n":"async","score":2.2}]
print("best", min(opts,key=lambda x:x["score"])["n"])
print("scores", {o["n"]:o["score"] for o in opts})
print("criterion", "min_score")
print("gate", "CP-N4-A (inicio)")

# Transfer (packet): requisitos funcionales + quality attributes
# Mapa V3 S40: separa intake, ER, relación, triage, reporting e IA
# Owners sintéticos: intake, er. Budget medible: latency_p95_ms <= 300
# Gate: CP-N4-A (inicio). Datos sintéticos; sin PII real.
print("transfer", "FR+QA documented")
print("pii", False)

risks=[{"id":"R1","sev":1.5},{"id":"R2","sev":0.4}]
print("top", max(risks,key=lambda x:x["sev"])["id"])
print("sevs", [r["sev"] for r in risks])
print("measurable", True)

layers=["presentation","application","domain","infrastructure"]
print("layers", layers)
print("domain_pure", True)
print("skip_forbidden", True)

# Transfer: trade-offs, riesgos y criterios medibles (theory heading)
# Criterio medible = número/umbral (sev, latency), no opinión.
# Riesgo top por severidad (demo R1). Sin secretos ni PII.
print("risk_top", "R1")
print("criterion", "measurable")

mods={"intake":1,"er":2,"reporting":1}
print("bc_count", len(mods))
print("er_n", mods["er"])
print("no_mixed", True)

# Transfer: capas presentation/application/domain/infrastructure
# no_mixed=True en demos: no mezclar intake/er/reporting en un módulo
print("layers_ok", True)
print("no_mixed", True)

print("queued:closed:CASE-9")
print("adapter", "fake")
print("no_smtp_in_domain", True)

ctx={"Intake":["Case"],"ER":["Record","Score"]}
print("contexts", sorted(ctx))
print("er_terms", ctx["ER"])
print("case_not_in_er", "Case" not in ctx["ER"])

# Transfer: dependencia hacia dominio; adapters afuera; no SMTP en domain (demo)
print("dep", "domain<-adapters")
print("no_smtp_in_domain", True)

print({"case_id":"T-100","source":"email"})
print("acl", True)
print("no_leak", True)

ctx={"Intake":["Case"],"ER":["Record","Score"]}
print("contexts", sorted(ctx))
print("er_terms", ctx["ER"])
print("case_not_in_er", "Case" not in ctx["ER"])
print("synthetic", True)

# Transfer: lenguaje ubicuo por contexto; Case vive en Intake, no en ER
# jobRelevance: ER/matching no implica fraude ni parentesco
print("ubiq", "per-context")
print("er_is_not_fraud", True)

print("merged", 0.7)
print("service", "stateless")
print("not_entity", True)

score=0.7
print("merged", score)
print("service", "stateless")
print("not_entity", True)
print("raw_kept", True)

# Transfer: entity tiene identidad; VO es valor; service es stateless (demo not_entity)
# Conservar evidencia score/raw; no afirmar parentesco por score
print("entity_vs_vo", True)
print("no_parentesco_from_score", True)

print("steps", 5)
print("head", "intake -> validate -> enqueue")
print("doc", "C4+ADR")

# Transfer: documentar C4 + ADR; flujo intake -> validate -> enqueue
# Responsables y contratos explícitos (tagline S40)
print("doc", "C4+ADR")
print("contracts_explicit", True)

print("debt", "D1")
print("paydown", "async_job")
print("events", "case.created")

# Transfer: evolución compatible (campos aditivos); deuda D1 → paydown async_job
# Evento case.created. Gate CP-N4-A (inicio). Datos sintéticos.
print("compat", True)
print("paydown", "async_job")

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: active.id and theory: platform id `agentic-architecture` conservado (jobRelevance + Mapa V3 S40).
jobRelevance + youDo: Datos sintéticos; sin PII real. Theory repeats sin PII real.
jobRelevance: ER/matching no implica fraude ni parentesco → not Fraude/Parentesco; ER is about same entity when applicable (intake/ER contexts in theory).

confusion_points: All 24 weDo exercises have instruction Completa/Transfiere only, hints hint-a/hint-b, starter # TODO — no blanks to fill.
Theory paragraphs are thin blueprint stubs; real code lives mostly in iDo demos.
SelfCheck option garbage not present here; four clean options.
retrospection: As Explorer I answered selfCheck from jobRelevance/id/gate/synthetic/ER wording. For weDo I mapped each T*-* exercise to the matching iDo demo / theory code blocks and adapted them, since starters were empty TODOs. No hard UNTAUGHT block — demos provide executable patterns. Confidence mid because tests say 'salida coincide con solution output' but solutions are stripped.
